DISCOVERY 612, AFTER HEARING, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF ANDREW ZHAO CONSTRUCTION'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $390, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Raymond Burke, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: Tony Lee
No other appearances.

AFTER HEARING, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Andrew Zhao Construction's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $390, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
